utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs and a total monthly cost—meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with cost and total property cost—meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs (standard and addon) and total travel cost—meets requirement. 4) additional_services: lists enhancement services with costs? The services are listed but individual costs are not specified; the requirement states 'any enhancement services with costs'. Costs for enhancements are missing except those embedded in travel add-on; for the other services, no costs are given. Therefore, this item is not fully specified. 5) total_budget: includes complete monthly and annual cost breakdown with savings—meets requirement.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item name from the final coverage plan to the closest exact item name in the ground-truth ratings. For physical health, the plan lists 'LifeFirst Standard Physical', which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health (rating 9). For mental health, the plan lists 'InsurePlus Standard Mental Health', which corresponds to 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health (rating 8). For property coverage, the plan lists 'VitalPlus Standard Coverage', which exactly matches property_protection.home_content.VitalPlus Standard Coverage (rating 7). For travel coverage, 'InsurePlus Standard Travel' corresponds to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 10). The 'Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on' matches travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10).
